goal: Design + implement full GA4 event tracking across all MeowTarot features (funnel + engagement + acquisition)
done: Added 16 tracker fns to analytics.js and wired them: meaning_viewed (card pages — fired from common.js initShell, path-gated to /cards/ since the 78 per-card modules all funnel through it; also in card-page.js), suit_viewed (suit-page.js), shuffle_hit + card_revealed (reading.js daily reveal), spread_selected (main.js quick/story), signin_started/blocked/succeeded + account_deleted (auth.js; success gated to SIGNED_IN + no prior user, not session-restore INITIAL_SESSION), deck_selected + deck_unlock_prompt (decks.js), share_poster_generated/downloaded (share.js). All pushes wrapped in try/catch (fire-and-forget). meaning_viewed/suit_viewed deduped per load.
verified: chrome harness on local edited code: suit_viewed{suit:major}, meaning_viewed{card_id:the-fool,orientation:upright}, and the full daily funnel (reading_start/shuffle_hit/card_revealed{card_count:1}/daily_streak_incremented/reading_completed_raw) all land in window.dataLayer with gtm.uniqueEventId (GTM received them). node --check passes all 9 files; md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
notes: Events reach GTM; GTM→GA4 mapping (catch-all GA4 event tag + custom dimensions) must still be set in the GTM UI — guide + Chrome prompt in [[MeowTarot Analytics]]. share_poster_* deck_id is null until deck is added to the share payload (follow-up).
